kenya_ndc_2031_2035.source: Ministry of Environment, Climate Change and Forestry
kenya_ndc_2031_2035.mitigation_target: 35% GHG reduction by 2035 vs BAU (215 MtCO2eq)
kenya_ndc_2031_2035.carbon_market_status: Framework under development via Article 6 Paris Agreement

tender_language.compliance_statement: This equipment proposal aligns with Kenya's NDC 2031-2035 mitigation target of 35% GHG reduction and supports the national priority of transport electrification.
tender_language.carbon_benefit: Deployment of electric construction equipment contributes to measurable emission reductions eligible under Kenya's developing carbon market framework (Climate Change Act 2023).
tender_language.just_transition: Included operator training program supports Kenya's just transition objectives for the construction workforce, as outlined in the NDC 2031-2035.
tender_language.policy_reference: Referenced: Kenya's Second NDC (2031-2035), Ministry of Environment, Climate Change and Forestry

relevant_to_equipment: Electric construction equipment qualifies as mitigation action
Government procurement will increasingly prioritize low-carbon equipment
Carbon credits may offset equipment cost for clients
Training programs eligible for climate finance support
